aids.title: SaaS Categories
aids.content:
PCFDD:
Productivity (M365, Google, Slack)
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot)
Finance/HR (Workday, QuickBooks)
Developer (GitHub, Jira)
Design (Figma, Canva)

aids.title: SaaS Pricing Models
aids.content:
Per-User: Slack, Salesforce
Tiered: HubSpot, Mailchimp
Usage-Based: Twilio, AWS
Freemium: Dropbox, Zoom

Choose based on customer usage patterns
